Name: British Tutors
Tagline: Award-Winning Home Tuition and Education Consultancy
About: Founded in 2008, British Tutors is an award-winning private tuition and education consultancy company. We arrange lessons with top tutors in Hong Kong and Singapore, offering academic support in a wide range of subjects.
Philosophy: June - September: Research the university and attend open days where possible. For some courses, you’ll be required to sit an admissions test, which the university use to assess your academic potential and suitability for the course.
Outcomes: British Tutors helps students gain admission to top universities, including Oxford and Cambridge. Their tailored approach enhances academic performance and builds confidence in a wide range of subjects.
Admissions: We are Asia’s experts in preparing students to apply for Oxford and Cambridge Universities. The application is a multi-step process and our team of Oxbridge graduate tutors and advisors can help you with every step of the journey.
Quote: British Tutors act as teachers and, more importantly, mentors for our children.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: Both Oxford and Cambridge are known for their prestige, and the competition is certainly fierce. Each year, thousands of talented applicants apply for a limited number of places, so standing out is essential.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Suzy holds a first class Bachelor of Science degree in Psychology from The Open University, UK. She works to find the perfect tutor for every British Tutors client.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Founded in 2008, British Tutors is an award-winning private tuition and education consultancy company. We arrange lessons with top tutors in Hong Kong and Singapore, offering academic support in a wide range of subjects.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Our tutors all have access to our library of British teaching materials, bringing the best of British education to their students in Hong Kong and Singapore. As a company, we specialise in teaching children who are entering the British schooling system, to bridge the gap and ease the transition between the local system and that in the UK.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Salina heads the accounts department, liaising with clients in both English and Cantonese. Taking pride in her efficiency and keen eye for detail, she is the point of contact for invoicing and sends on detailed monthly progress reports to clients.
